ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the token */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the token */,
  "mint" TEXT /* Mint address of the token */,
  "decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the token */,
  "logo_uri" TEXT /* Logo URI of the token */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token details were last updated */,
  "token_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to token_types table */,
  "website_uri" TEXT /* URL to the official website of the token */,
  "whitepaper_uri" TEXT /* URL to the token's whitepaper */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tokens_token_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_type_id") REFERENCES token_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the token type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the token type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_supply" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token supply record */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the token */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the token */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supply data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_token_supply_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token price record */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the token */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price record */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is quoted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_token_prices_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user details were last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the token */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the token */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_token_market_data_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the token transacted */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)
